dungeon: GENUINE ROTF gameplay run by player 'VoltiPlay' crossing several biome areas (dirt caves, purple-tiled dungeon, sandy maze, ice area, treasure vaults, a red concentric-square boss chamber). CORRECTION: an earlier draft mislabeled this a '16-dungeon completion challenge' — the '16' was the Arcane Symbol item STACK LIMIT and the '/15','/16' are EVENT-KILL counters, NOT a dungeon-progress meter. These are ~6-7 distinct AREAS, not 16 named dungeons.

(consume 10 -> a stat blessing). STARFORCE NODE EXTRACTION -> RUNES — 'You have carefully extracted a starforce node!
